$comment: The verdict contract. For each program, a conforming WosoolDSLValidator MUST produce the given `result`, and for FAIL cases MUST emit AT LEAST every listed diagnostic `code` (a superset is allowed — an implementation may detect more). For OK cases, listed `codes` are non-blocking WARNING diagnostics the validator MUST still emit (e.g. deprecation). `pass` names the validator stage (V1–V6) the case is designed to exercise; `severity`/`location`/`message` are NOT asserted (mirrors AWS ValidateStateMachineDefinition: branch on result + codes, not exact wording).

valid/07-deprecated-verb-warns.json.$note: 0.2: update_order_status is deprecated — admits, but the validator MUST emit a non-blocking deprecation warning (observable, not silent).

invalid/09-query-output-unknown-field.js.$note: 0.2 keystone (negative A): $.step_1.output.clients[0].price names a field absent from list_clients.response_schema (clients items are {id,name}). Typed-by-name, not in name only.

invalid/10-query-output-shape-mismatch.j.$note: 0.2 keystone (negative B): $.step_1.output.clients.id treats the clients ARRAY as an object (missing index). Array/object confusion is a static error.
